justification: The diff successfully migrates from Java EE (javax.*) to Jakarta EE (jakarta.*) and updates Spring Boot to 3.x, but sets java.version to 17 instead of 21, missing the target version. It adds @Serial annotations for serialVersionUID, which is good, but doesn't leverage Java 21 features like virtual threads or pattern matching enhancements. The dependency updates are mostly coherent, though upgrading Hibernate from 5.2.4 to the latest 6.x (implied by Spring Boot 3) is a major leap not fully reflected in the diff (hibernate-core artifact changed to org.hibernate.orm but version is managed by Spring Boot, which is fine). The diff is clean with no spurious churn.
